headline: Morning Call Sheet: AI rally powers markets despite inflation fears
summary: David Zervos, Chief Market Strategist at Jefferies, Ryan Detrick, Chief Market Strategist at Carson Group, and Jose Torres, Senior Economist at Interactive Brokers, say AI strength and investor optimism continue supporting markets despite inflation and geopolitical risks.
